title: Number Field
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Number Field primitive preserving model-owned numeric/text state, deterministic parsing and formatting, clamping, stepping, keyboard increments, form value semantics, grouped controls, scrub parts, and origin data attributes.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, keyboard modifier, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native render helper.
Provides Effect Schema, Option, and predicate helpers for serializable options, value states, constraints, and event payloads.

development.reason: Origin React runtime is evidence only; installable source is Foldkit-native.
Origin Base UI React primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
React is origin evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

deviations.summary: Numeric value and visible text are supplied by the consuming Foldkit model instead of hidden component state.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit render helpers are stateless. Text entry, keyboard, and stepper handlers emit value-change facts so the application update function owns the canonical value and text.

deviations.summary: Parity origin fixture uses static source-derived markup and docs-demo dimensions.
deviations.rationale: The installable source must not import upstream React. Static fixtures preserve the pinned part structure, data attributes, form input, keyboard behavior, and exact grouped-control dimensions while the origin source remains checked in under repos/base-ui.

deviations.summary: Scrub area and cursor attributes are exposed, while pointer-lock and virtual-cursor side effects are left to consumers.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit side effects belong in Commands, not render helpers. The primitive preserves scrub parts and data attributes, and exposes pure step helpers for scrub-driven value changes.
